name: Vulklok
description: Standard issue sniper rifle for Diriga.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.3
patchlogs.changes:
Vulklok fire rate has been decreased from .5 seconds between shots to .15 seconds per shots.
Vulklok accuracy has been increased to 100%.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.2
patchlogs.changes:
Vulklok Weapon Changes:
The following changes have been made to the Sentinel Vulklok weapon as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/526736-psa-vulklok-damage-adjustments/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Vulklok’s sell price to match other Sentinel weapons.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Diriga and Vulklok missing from the Codex.
Fixed the Vulklok not properly receiving adjustments to magazine size, fire-rate and reload time via Mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: The Diriga shocks nearby enemies, and picks off distant threats, utilizing the Vulklok sniper rifle and the ‘Calculated Shot’, ‘Arc Coil’ and ‘Electro Pulse’ precepts.
